};

import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import type { Column, Order } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<Order.orderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<Order.orderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

interface OrderModel {
  id: string;
  customer: string;
  status: Order.orderStatus;
  items: number;
  total: number;
  date: string;
}

const columns: Column<OrderModel>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as Order.orderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        { class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}` },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const total = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(total);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("div", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const order: OrderModel = row.original as OrderModel;
      return [
        h(Button, { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onView(order) }, () => "View"),
        h(Button, { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onCancel(order) }, () => "Cancel"),
      ];
    },
  },
];

defineProps<{
  data: OrderModel[];
}>();
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable :columns="columns" :data="data" />
</template>
